tasks.title: Release kickoff
tasks.body: Kick off the release announcement: confirm the target date, the owners, and the scope of what ships. Checkpoint - a human marks this done.

tasks.title: Draft the launch blog post
tasks.body: Draft the launch blog post for this release. The dispatched worker agent receives this item's title and body as its brief; the product/release context rides the project instance.

tasks.title: Legal sign-off
tasks.body: Review the drafted announcement content for legal risk and sign off. A rejection sends the content back for revision; nothing behind this gate proceeds until a human resolves it.

acceptance.description: The announcement content carries no unreviewed legal claims (trademarks, comparative claims, forward-looking statements).

tasks.title: Announce the release is live
tasks.body: Publish the announcement that the release has shipped.
